sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107866" key="u(perstei/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερστείχω</orth>, <sense id="n107866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass over,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κολώνην</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.36.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
